visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium shot of a young woman standing in a warehouse store, likely Costco. She wears a patterned black and white bucket hat and a white lace blouse, smiling broadly while holding a pink rectangular box of cake. Behind her are high stacks of boxes and signs for 'Kuzefuku Shoten'. The lighting is bright and industrial warehouse lighting. (2) The camera pans across stacks of the pink boxes, identified as strawberry honey cake. A finger points to a price tag showing 329 NTD. The background remains the bustling warehouse environment with white shelving units and various food products packed in bulk, creating a typical retail atmosphere. (3) The woman is back on screen, gesturing excitedly towards the product. Her facial expressions and hand movements show high enthusiasm. She points to the text overlays that explain the limited-time nature of the product. The environment is filled with large pallets of goods under bright studio-like store lights. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting, likely a living room. Close-up shots show hands carefully opening the white and pink cardboard packaging on a marble-textured table. A glass of green matcha latte sits on the table nearby, providing a cozy domestic context for the product unboxing experience. (5) A final close-up features the sliced honey cake inside its box. A whimsical bulldog-shaped ceramic figure is moved in front of the camera as if it is eating the cake. The woman’s hands are seen holding the figure against the backdrop of the open cake box on a light-colored surface.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 久世福 現在最新的. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 期間限定 趕快買 九世福 草莓蜂蜜蛋糕. (3) [Subtitle]: 然後他只有到30號. (4) [Subtitle]: 因為他是特展才有的. (5) [Subtitle]: 而且現在是草莓季才有有的 特別口味. (6) [Subtitle]: 喜歡草莓的人 不要錯過 我們回去吃看看. (7) [Subtitle]: 看有沒有很好吃. (8) [Variety]: 香噴噴~. (9) [Subtitle]: 329元 草莓 整個都是紅色的 特展限定 特展限定. (10) [Subtitle]: 不然平常 就只有原味 或者是抹茶 試試看. (11) [Variety]: 哦~. (12) [Variety]: 哦 超級草莓. (13) [Subtitle]: 草莓香氣 非常明顯 吃起來也是 滿滿的草莓味 但我覺得 甜度比較高 如果不怕甜的人 一定要來試試看 這個草莓真的是 嗯 好吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator presenting the product and unboxing it.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a black and white cow-patterned bucket hat and a white puff-sleeve lace blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video transitions from a large-scale warehouse retail environment (Costco) with industrial shelving to a clean, indoor home setting featuring a marble-top table and a sofa.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks enthusiastically in Traditional Chinese over a cheerful, mid-tempo acoustic guitar track. The tone is bright and professional, with a fast speech rate and clear articulation. The BGM features a light rhythmic drum beat and acoustic guitar strumming, creating an upbeat mood. (2) A subtle rustling sound of a cardboard box being lifted and handled triggers this phase. The speaker's voice continues at a fast pace, detailing the product features. The acoustic guitar BGM remains consistent in the background, maintaining a high-energy and positive valence throughout the segment. (3) A sharp 'ding' sound effect occurs, used as a transition marker. The speaker's pitch modulates significantly as she emphasizes the price and limited availability of the product. The music continues with steady percussion and guitar chords, providing a constant rhythmic bed for the narration. (4) Sounds of paper tearing and plastic crinkling are clearly heard as the inner packaging of the cake is opened. The female voiceover remains energetic, describing the sensory details of the unboxing. The BGM remains steady in volume, effectively overlapping with the vocal track. (5) A comical cartoon-style 'boing' sound effect is heard during a visual shift. The speaker continues her review, her voice showing high arousal and excitement. The acoustic guitar music provides a melodic contrast to the sharp, short-duration sound effect, keeping the overall production style lively. (6) A rhythmic, synthesized 'munching' sound effect is introduced as the speaker describes the flavor. The voice concludes with a positive, rising intonation, recommending the product to the audience. The BGM fades out slightly as the narration ends, leaving a clean, high-fidelity finish to the track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Unboxing and Taste Test -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and recommend a limited-edition strawberry honey cake found at Costco, highlighting its availability, unique flavor, and price through an energetic unboxing and review format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of a specific brand's product at a specific retailer with a strong 'must-buy' recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: An energetic social media product review that balances on-site retail atmosphere with domestic unboxing aesthetic to engage the audience.
